[[{{{1}}}]]
{{{2}}}

{{{1}}}
{{{2}}}

{{{1}}} ===Goal=== An explanatory text on a customary HTML manner for difficult words. If the cursor is on the difficult word a supplementary explanation is given.

===Example=== {{Tooltip| CSS 2 | Cascading Style Sheets level 2 d.d. 12 may 1998} . Gives.. The cursor {{Tooltip|CSS 2|Cascading Style Sheets level 2 d.d. 12 may 1998}}

Related: acronym, abbr (Dependency on browser).

revision.comment: Unprotected Template:Tooltip: Consensus at [[WP:ANI]] appears to be that these should be unprotected. Unprotecting without prejudice to new consensus emerging at [[WT:HRT]]: I won't consider it wheel-warring if anyone re-protects, etc. using [[WP:TW|TW]]

revision.text: #REDIRECT [[Template:Abbr]] {{R from merge}}

{{{1}}} Please note that using a quotation mark (") in the second parameter (the hidden text) will cause the template to display incorrectly. To display this character, use the {{wp|List of XML and HTML character entity references|html entity}} quot (i.e. write ''& quot ;'' without the spaces) or alternatively put the second parameter in tags. [[Category:Code templates]][[pt:Predefinição:Tt]]

revision.comment: This is used all over the place for non-abbreviations, with is against the HTML specs. In non-abbr cases, it should be a span.

revision.comment: Undid revision 992173733 by [[Special:Contributions/SMcCandlish|SMcCandlish]] ([[User talk:SMcCandlish|talk]]) I get it, but this goes against the TFD *and* the RFD - maybe it's time to actually this?
revision.text: #REDIRECT [[Template:Abbr]] {{R from merge}}

revision.comment: Then we can discuss it again. Meanwhile (since the REDIRECT is deprecated, using proper code here breaks nothing, and it un-breaks a lot of HTML abuse). I'll open a discussion thread about it.
revision.text: {{{1|}}}{{Documentation|Template:Abbr/doc}}

revision.comment: Integrate features from [[Template:Hover title]], which should be merged away, after instances have their 1 and 2 parameters flipped.
Nominated for merging (from [[Template:Hover title]]), at [[WP:TFD]]
Updating TFD template: discussion was relisted ([[WP:XFDC|XFDcloser]])
bug fix
implementing the more accessible sandbox code now that it's been well test-cased. It uses [[Template:Sronly]] to provide the tooltip text as an inline note.
Going back to previous version to test something further.
switching back to the sandbox code; I think I have a solution for the remaining issue, and need to sandbox it separately.
Going back to previous version again; something odd has come up when some of the test cases are used in isolation instead of on the test-cases page; not sure what the issue is yet.
Updating TFD template: discussion was relisted ([[WP:XFDC|XFDcloser]])
[[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2020 December 19#Template:Hover title and Template:Tooltip]] closed as merge ([[WP:XFDC|XFDcloser]])
Move dotted to template styles per talk

revision.text: #REDIRECT [[Template:Abbr]] {{R from merge}}

{{{1}}} Please note that using a quotation mark (") in the second parameter (the hidden text) will cause the template to display incorrectly. To display this character, use the {{wp|List of XML and HTML character entity references|html entity}} quot (i.e. write ''& quot ;'' without the spaces) or alternatively put the second parameter in tags. [[Category:Code templates]][[pt:Predefinição:Tt]]

[[{{{1}}}]]
{{{2}}}

{{{1}}}
{{{2}}}

{{{1}}} ===Goal=== An explanatory text on a customary HTML manner for difficult words. If the cursor is on the difficult word a supplementary explanation is given.

===Example=== {{Tooltip| CSS 2 | Cascading Style Sheets level 2 d.d. 12 may 1998} . Gives.. The cursor {{Tooltip|CSS 2|Cascading Style Sheets level 2 d.d. 12 may 1998}}

Related: acronym, abbr (Dependency on browser).

{{{1}}}
{{{2}}}

{{{1}}} ===Goal=== An explanatory text on a customary HTML manner for difficult words. If the cursor is on the difficult word a supplementary explanation is given.

===Example=== {{Tooltip| CSS 2 | Cascading Style Sheets level 2 d.d. 12 may 1998} . Gives.. The cursor {{Tooltip|CSS 2|Cascading Style Sheets level 2 d.d. 12 may 1998}}

Related: acronym, abbr (Dependency on browser).

revision.comment: rm per [[Wikipedia:Templates_for_discussion/Log/2011_February_5#Template:R_from_other_template]]
revision.text: #REDIRECT [[Template:Abbr]] {{R from merge}}

{{{1}}} Please note that using a quotation mark (") in the second parameter (the hidden text) will cause the template to display incorrectly. To display this character, use the {{wp|List of XML and HTML character entity references|html entity}} quot (i.e. write ''& quot ;'' without the spaces) or alternatively put the second parameter in tags. [[Category:Code templates]][[pt:Predefinição:Tt]]
